---
title: "The OpenDroneMap Tutorial Page"
id: activity-odm-10
order: 104
summary: "OpenDroneMap offers a free, powerful, and open source choice for creating, processing, and analyzing low-cost aerial imagery."
source_url: "https://docs.opendronemap.org/tutorials/"
modules:
  - module-postprocessing
Goals:
  - module-goals-pp
materials:
  - material-hs-3
  - material-hs-4
assessments:
  - pp-assessment
labels:
  - basic
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/activities-odm-10.md"
---
